channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish bin has beel overloaded and dropped on the ground, which has become unhygienic and a big mess., 4th March
item.description:
Rubbish by the Thicket road gate of Crystal Palace Park has been left for the last 5 days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Thicket Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 239 kilburn lane, 4th March
item.description:
Large amount of waste dumped here on both sides Of entrance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kilburn Lane, North Kensington, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load (Estates)

item.title: Dirty matress and sink, 4th March
item.description:
Left abandoned in back street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 155a, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Keep left bollard and lighting, 4th March
item.description:
Mid road keep left bollard and illuminated sign has been damaged for more than 6 weeks Please repair as this is an accident black spot
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Utility barriers still on roadway, 4th March
item.description:
LBB barriers have been left at above location for over one month on roadway. Please remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Belmont Road, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous Damaged Vehicle, 4th March
item.description:
I reported these vehicles on 16th Feb ref 8934360 The vehicles are still there & the roadside damage has got worse & is even more dangerous for anyone passing close. Can you help please advise what is being done about making this safe?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Iron Mill Lane, Crayford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nearly 80 pot holes on this road, 4th March
item.description:
You have replied to my previous report saying now fixed. I have just drove down this road and it’s still not been fixed. Try driving up the road and see for yourself. There must be at least 60-80 potholes on this road it’s a joke.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous cars being parked in road by one person., 4th March
item.description:
Cars being parked in road for months by same person. Seems to be using road as garage or selling cars. Car was parked out side house for over a month untaxed & no mot. Then driven by said person. There is limited parking here for visitors and tradespeople. There are at least 7 cars at present if not more.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blindman's Lane, Cheshunt
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle with mould growing inside, 4th March
item.description:
There is an abandon vehicle that has been parked in front of that abandoned shop there for a very long time. There is moss growing on the vehicle and mould growing inside. At least one tire is flat.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Adys Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pickford road avenue road remains of litter by the tree, 4th March
item.description:
I have reported the signage Pickford road broken damaged and you are looking into this thank you but there are remains of litter bits of a car no plate I think under the tree. In fact I picked up litter around the tree today this is ongoing problem and seems to get left behind. Please can you pick the litter up around this small tree grass verge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 127 Brondesbury road, 4th March
item.description:
See photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gravel across roadway, 4th March
item.description:
Once again rubble and gravel has been dropped into the roadway on a bend causing a dangerous hazard to vulnerable road users such as cyclists and motorcyclists.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Curtismill Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 99 Brondesbury villas, 4th March
item.description:
See photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping in unmarked refuse bags, 4th March
item.description:
Several unmarked black refuse sacks left on pavement on Elizabeth Fry Road. They were torn and overflowing. I moved them down the street a few metres. I tried to report yesterday but didn't work not sure why. There for days now and full of rotten food.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bayford Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 27 Brondesbury villas, 4th March
item.description:
See photo

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brondesbury villas Kilburn high road to 53 both sides, 4th March
item.description:
Rubbish everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Villas, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 4th March
item.description:
Another mattress has turned up on the corner of Bannockburn and Ceres Road outside Derays corner shoo.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic cones on the road at the end of tyron way where it meets Langdon shaw, 4th March
item.description:
Traffic cones that appear to have been placed on the road illegally to prevent people from being able to park their car

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Tyron Way, Longlands, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass junction of maidstone and warwick rd by no 10-16 Warwick Rd, 4th March
item.description:
The broken glass has been there for 2 weeks now and not cleaned by by street cleansing team

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Maidstone Road, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside number 29, 4th March
item.description:
Blocked internally. I’ve reported before.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Goldhurst Terrace, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
